description: An agent must write a one-page executive summary of a 50-page detailed analysis report.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the full report to understand the problem statement, key findings, and final recommendations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly grasps the core message of the entire document.

nodes.task_description: Draft the executive summary, ensuring it is concise and covers all critical elements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a well-written summary that is approximately one page long.
